name: CFM-Bench: A Unified Multi-Domain, Multi-Task Benchmark for Channel Foundation Models

description: arXiv:2607.14975v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Channel foundation models (CFMs) are developing rapidly, with recent studies reporting benefits from pretraining across downstream wireless tasks. Yet CFMs are commonly evaluated in model-specific pipelines with different data, radio configurations, partitions, adaptation procedures, task definitions, and metrics. Reported comparisons therefore te...
author: Yuan Gao, Wenjun Yu, Jun Jiang, Yunfan Li, Xinyu Guo, Shugong Xu
